headline: LyondellBasell Could Hit $87 by Year-End Given These Catalysts
summary: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE:LYB) has been one of the more dramatic recovery stories in the basic materials sector this year. The stock has gained 15.68% over the past week, surged 44.77% over the past month and is up 88.76% year-to-date, with shares recently trading near $83.79 against a 52-week low of $41.58. Most analysts remain ... LyondellBasell Could Hit $87 by Year-End Given These Catalysts
